common.location_hint: This place will appear in your Atlas. Exact coordinates are optional.
common.place_pin_hint: This place will appear as a map pin in Atlas
common.location_invalid: This location has no valid coordinates yet — search and select a place, or use exact location.
common.delete_confirm: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
common.private_by_default_hint: Private by default. You can share with trusted connections anytime.

home.capsule_ready_card: A message from your past self is ready.
home.no_recent_memories: No memories yet — moments you add will show up here.

career.title: Career
career.subtitle: Experience, projects, certificates, and awards.
career.no_experience: Your story starts with a single role.
career.no_projects: Your next project could begin today.
career.no_certificates: Certificates you earn will show up here.
career.no_awards: Recognition will find its place here.
career.reflection_placeholder: What did you learn? What challenges came up? How did you solve them? What would you improve next time?
career.download_cv_hint: Opens your browser's print dialog — choose "Save as PDF" for a clean A4 resume.
career.visibility_hint: Anyone with this link can view your public career profile.
career.resume_connections_notice: This resume is only visible to trusted connections.
career.resume_not_found: This resume could not be found.
career.signin_required_notice: Sign in to view this resume.

portfolio.section_work_sub: A few projects that show how I work — the problem, my role, and the outcome.
portfolio.section_experience_sub: What I've built and improved in real teams.
portfolio.section_leadership_sub: Leading people and events, not just code.
portfolio.section_skills_sub: Grouped by how I actually apply them.
portfolio.contact_sub: Open to internship and graduate opportunities.
portfolio.footer_note: This is a public portfolio. The full EdenAtlas personal platform requires sign-in.
portfolio.skills_familiar_note: Familiar with / worked with (exposure, not deep expertise):

project.not_found: This case study could not be found.

memories.title: Memories
memories.subtitle: Photo moments, organized into albums.
memories.no_posts: Every journey starts with a single memory.
memories.trash_subtitle: Moved-to-trash memories stay here until you permanently delete them.
memories.trash_confirm_body: It will disappear from Memories and Atlas right away. You can restore it later from Trash.
memories.delete_confirm_body: This cannot be undone. The photo file will also be removed, unless it's still referenced elsewhere.
memories.permanent_delete_storage_error: Couldn't remove the photo file. Nothing was deleted — try again.

journal.title: Journal
journal.no_entries: Write something today. Your future self will thank you.

finance.title: Finance
finance.no_expenses: Track your first expense — small habits build a clear picture.

journey.title: Journey
journey.no_events: Every life has milestones worth remembering. Add your first.

habits.title: Habits
habits.no_habits: Small steps create lasting change. Start one today.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: A day-by-day view of your own expenses, photos, and journal entries.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Your own spending, photos, and journal activity this month — a quick recap, not a public leaderboard.
reports.weekend_warning: You're spending more on weekends (RM {weekend}/day) than weekdays (RM {weekday}/day) this month.

monthly_story.title: Monthly Story
monthly_story.subtitle: A warm recap of your month, not just numbers.

year_review.title: Year in Review
year_review.subtitle: A quiet look back at your year.

people.title: Connections
people.subtitle: Discover the people in your EdenAtlas — and open a profile to see what they've chosen to share.
people.recommended_subtitle: Recently joined people you can connect with.
people.no_recommendations: No one to recommend just yet.
people.no_connections: No friends yet. Invite someone you trust to share part of your journey.
people.no_sent_requests: You haven't sent any requests yet.
people.remove_friend_confirm: Remove this friend? They'll lose access to anything you've shared with friends only.
people.respond_in_requests: Sent you a request — respond below
people.no_goals: No goals yet — set one to start tracking progress.

atlas.title: Atlas
atlas.subtitle: A map of the places your life has touched.
atlas.no_locations: The map will grow as your journey continues.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Life chapters that group your Memories, Journal, Finance, Journey, and Career records together.
collections.no_collections: Every chapter begins with one memory.
collections.empty_memories: This chapter is waiting for its first memory.
collections.empty_journal: No journal entries in this chapter yet.
collections.empty_finance: No expenses recorded in this chapter yet.
collections.empty_journey: No milestones in this chapter yet.
collections.empty_career: No projects linked to this chapter yet.
collections.delete_blocked: This collection still has {count} item(s) in it — move or remove them before deleting.

constellation.title: Memory Constellation
constellation.subtitle: See how your life chapters connect.
constellation.empty: Your constellation will grow as you add memories, journals, and life chapters.
constellation.select_node: Select a node to see its details.

me.title: Me
me.displayname_hint: — what people see on your greeting and profile header
me.username_hint: lets people find you by @handle on Connections
me.username_public_hint: People can find you by your username.
me.invalid_username: 3-24 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, underscore, or dot.
me.default_weather_city_hint: Fallback used if location access is denied.
me.privacy_note: New Memories, Journal entries, and Journey events default to this visibility — change it from the Preferences tab.
me.role_owner_desc: full access everywhere, the only role that sees Connections/System Logs.
me.role_friend_desc: has their own space for Memories/Journal/Journey/Habits — Finance, Time Capsule, and Daily Reflection stay Owner-only.
me.role_viewer_desc: read-only, sees public content from the Owner and any Friend.
me.role_finance_desc: Finance is always private and Owner-only — it is never shown on anyone's public profile or Collection, regardless of role.
me.whitelist_desc: Everyone who has ever signed in. Promote to Friend to give them their own space for Memories/journal/photos/journey/habits; demote to make them a read-only Viewer again.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: System alerts, checked as of your last visit to each page — not real-time push.

login.title: Sign in with Google to continue.
login.privacy: Your data stays private — only you decide what to share.

profile.username_not_found: This profile could not be found.

time_capsule.title: Time Capsule
time_capsule.subtitle: Write something for your future self.
time_capsule.empty: Write something for the future you.
time_capsule.empty_subtitle: Your sealed capsules will appear here.
time_capsule.home_ready_card: A message from your past self is ready.

friend_space.private_space_note: This is your own private space — Memories and Journal entries you add stay private unless you choose to share them.

assistant.title: Atlas Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask about your own Memories, Journal, Journey and Calendar. Read-only — it can't change anything.
assistant.scopes_hint: Off by default. Nothing outside these scopes is ever read.
assistant.scope_calendar_hint: Calendar: Organizes your selected Memories and Journal entries by date. It never reads them on its own — also select Memories and/or Journal.
assistant.empty_subtitle: Pick a data scope above, then try one of these:
assistant.prompt_missing_location: Show my Memories that still need a confirmed location.
assistant.prompt_this_month: What did I record this month?
assistant.prompt_draft_reflection: Draft a monthly reflection from my selected sources.
assistant.input_placeholder: Ask about your Memories, Journal, Journey…
assistant.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Check anything important.
assistant.consent_body: When you ask a question, the Atlas Assistant sends your message and short excerpts from the EdenAtlas data scopes you've selected (never full images, exact coordinates, Finance, or other people's content) to a configured Qwen AI service to generate an answer. This only happens when you send a message — never just by opening this page.
assistant.consent_body_2: This assistant is read-only: it cannot create, edit, delete, publish, or share anything on your behalf.
assistant.consent_checkbox: I understand what is sent and agree to use the Atlas Assistant.
assistant.error_not_configured: The Atlas Assistant isn't fully set up yet — try again later.
assistant.error_owner_only: This assistant is only available to the Owner account.
assistant.error_session: Your session expired — please sign in again.
assistant.error_origin: This request was blocked for security reasons.
assistant.error_rate_limited: You've hit the usage limit for now — try again later.
assistant.error_message_too_long: That message is too long — try a shorter question.
assistant.error_upstream: The AI service didn't respond — please try again.
assistant.error_network: Couldn't reach the assistant — check your connection.
assistant.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
assistant.scope_change_notice: Data access changed. A new chat was started.
assistant.select_scope_notice: Select at least one data source to ask about your records.
assistant.calendar_needs_source_notice: Calendar summaries also need Memories and/or Journal selected.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Browse anime and keep your own watch list.
discover.empty_discover_subtitle: Try a different tab or search term.
discover.empty_mylist_subtitle: Add anime from Discover to start tracking it here.
discover.error_follow_failed: Couldn't add to your list — check console.
discover.error_rate_limited: You've hit the usage limit for now — try again in a moment.
discover.error_upstream: AniList couldn't be reached — try again in a moment.
discover.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
